name: Crimson-Streak Drifter
oracle_text:
Whenever ~ attacks, energize.
Alt-Mode (Nitro-Drift) — {1}: Until your next turn, ~'s base power and toughness become 4/1 and it gains haste. Activate only as a sorcery.
flavor_text: Speed is the only logic that matters when the road turns into a battlefield.
design_notes: Designed to support both the WR (Rapid Strike) and UR (High-Speed Ignition) archetypes. In its base Robot mode, it provides resource generation by energizing whenever it attacks, fueling other artifact or combo plays. Its Alt-Mode offers a tactical shift into a high-power/low-toughness profile with haste, enabling sudden explosive combat damage or tempo shifts. As a rare, the combination of mana generation and morphological utility makes it a powerful engine for aggressive decks.
